end local function d(d)return A[d-(1082502-1029867)]end do local d=math.floor local c=table.insert local n=A local Q=string.sub local end return(function(A,n,Q,x,W,b,t,l,f,S,D,v,c,j,y,E,X,V,a,U,h)D,l,c,V,S,j,U,E,X,f,v,y,a,h=function(A,d)local n=f(d)local Q=function()return c(A,{},d,n)end return Q end,function(A,d)local n=f(d)local Q=function(Q,x,W,b)return c(A,{Q;x,W,b},d,n)end return Q end,function(c,Q,x,W)local UU={}local
